positive: A stylized, continuous line drawing of a whimsical, interconnected forest scene. The composition features silhouetted elements of mythical trees, glowing mushrooms, floating lanterns, and stylized woodland creatures (deer, foxes, owls) arranged in a harmonious circular pattern. The style must be minimalist, elegant, and highly adaptable for screen printing on fabric. Use a deep indigo and warm gold color palette, rendered as a clean, single-color graphic with high contrast against a light background. The composition should feel organic and flow seamlessly, making it a perfect repeating pattern element. Vectors, intricate detail, high contrast, graphic design, woodcut style.
negative: blurry, watermark, signature, text, extra limbs, bad anatomy, low resolution, jpeg artifacts, noise, poor composition, messy, gradients
